title: Parkour Utility
description: A bunch of stuff to help make parkour courses!
body:
[![Requires Infinilib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3588988b5328043baecee8a8fbfc04da81e0331a.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/infinilib)
[![Requires Infiniresources](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e88f9ed70232bb6ba428929e707b8a14da1003bc.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/infiniresources)
![Avaliable as Datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d26d277c615459d01f3480b77b79f1132d61c0a8.png)
![Avaliable as Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a17ddbcb88a7ea8e5c245b30eba6b151c0070ef.png)

[![Read the Wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95da6e7c8912a2e4caf51882d0187bc9a77fd51a.png)](https://infiniverse.gitbook.io/)
[![Chat with us on Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4ca9a5bb2d57afa6019b34cd08b90b1cfb930ce.png)](https://discord.gg/WBqEXSt9qy)

---

Adds a bunch of items to aid in making parkour courses!

All of the following items & blocks can be found in the creative inventory! Simply just search the name of the item to find it!
_(Note, they will appear as enchanted books, as that is how I implemented it. Don't worry, as soon as you hold any of the items, the will be replaced with their actual item!)_

<details>
  <summary>Blocks</summary>

  **NOTE:** By "next to [block]", you have to be within 0.1 blocks of the targeted block, meaning if you walk right into the block or stand on top, you will be "next to" the block.
  - Checkpoint
    - Will become the spawnpoint of any player that steps on top of it.
  - Jump Pad (Level 1)
    - Gives any player on top Jump Boost 5 for 3 seconds. (approx. jump 5~6 blocks)
  - Jump Pad (Level 2)
    - Gives any player on top Jump Boost 10 for 3 seconds. (approx. jump 10~11 blocks)
  - Speed Pad (Level 1)
    - Gives any player on top Speed 5 for 3 seconds. (approx. 12~14 blocks/sec)
  - Speed Pad (Level 2)
    - Gives any player on top Speed 10 for 3 seconds. (approx. 18~20 blocks/sec)
  - Transpositioner
    - Gives any player next to it (not including below) Levitation 7 for 1 second. (approx. fly 7.5 blocks)
  - Glide Provider
    - Gives any player next to it (not including below) Levitation 15 for 7 seconds.
  - Death Pad
    - Instantly kills any player next to it.
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Items (Abilities)</summary>

  **NOTE:** Creative mode versions of each ability can be found ONLY in the creative inventory. These versions have no cooldown.

  To use any ability, simply right click it.
  - Dash
    - Dashes 10 blocks in front of you.
  - Boost
    - Freezes you for 1 second.
    - Gives you Speed 5 for 15 seconds.
</details>
